docs.title: Introduction & Platform Overview
docs.content:
What is ProCode EduPulse?

ProCode EduPulse is a comprehensive, interactive Learning Management System (LMS) designed specifically for aspiring software developers. Our philosophy is simple: you learn by writing code, not just by watching videos.

Key Features

  • Interactive IDE: An embedded code editor where you can write, run, and test HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and more.
  • Structured Roadmaps: Step-by-step career tracks (Frontend, Backend, DevOps) guided by curated content.
  • Automated Challenges: Test your knowledge instantly with live coding challenges that validate your syntax and logic.
  • Community Driven: Join thousands of other learners on Discord, review courses, and help others debug code.

docs.title: Setting Up Your Developer Profile
docs.content:
Your Digital Portfolio

Your ProCode profile acts as your developer showcase. Every time you complete a challenge or finish a course, your profile is updated.

How to Customize

Navigate to the Profile tab from the top navigation bar. Here, you can:

  1. Update your display name and professional role (e.g., 'Aspiring Full Stack Engineer').
  2. Toggle between Dark and Light mode.
  3. View your global rank (based on your earned Gems).
  4. Link your GitHub and LinkedIn profiles for potential recruiters to find you.

categories.title: Using the Web IDE
categories.content: Everything you need to know about the ProCode Editor.

docs.title: Essential Keyboard Shortcuts
docs.content:
Work Faster with Shortcuts

To maximize your productivity, we have mapped standard IDE keyboard shortcuts directly into the browser editor.

  • Ctrl/Cmd + Enter: Run Code (Executes the current code and refreshes the Live Preview).
  • Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + C: Copy All Code to your clipboard.
  • Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + R: Reset Editor back to the initial starting code (Warning: this deletes your progress!).
  • Ctrl/Cmd + S: Auto-Save. The platform saves your code to local storage automatically, but this shortcut provides visual confirmation.

docs.title: Using AI Tutor Hints
docs.content:
Get Unstuck with AI

ProCode integrates directly with AI models (like Gemini) to provide context-aware hints.

How it works:

If you are stuck on a challenge, click the AI Hint button. The system sends your current code and the challenge requirements to the AI. The AI is specifically prompted not to give you the exact answer, but to give you a conceptual hint or point out syntax errors.

Note: You must configure your API key in your Profile settings to enable this feature entirely.

docs.title: Code of Conduct
docs.content:
Our Principles

We are dedicated to providing a harassment-free experience for everyone, regardless of gender, sexual orientation, disability, physical appearance, race, or religion.

Rules to Live By

  • Be Respectful: Always assume positive intent. We were all beginners once.
  • No Plagiarism: Do not post direct, copy-paste solutions to challenges on the forums. Guide users to the answer instead of giving it away.
  • Constructive Reviews: When leaving a course review, be specific about what you liked or what needs improvement. Comments like 'this sucks' are not helpful and will be moderated.

docs.title: FAQ & Troubleshooting
docs.content:
Common Issues

Q: My code runs, but the challenge fails. Why?

A: Our automated testers look for specific HTML structures or CSS classes. Double-check that your class names match the instructions exactly, including case-sensitivity.

Q: My progress disappeared!

A: If you are not signed in, your progress is saved in your browser's localStorage. If you cleared your browser cache or used incognito mode, the data is lost. We highly recommend creating a free account to sync your data to the cloud.

Q: The IDE is not responding.

A: Sometimes infinite loops in JavaScript can crash the browser thread. Refresh the page. Changes are auto-saved every keystroke.
